title: polypodium furfuratum
intro: Polypodium furfuratum, also known as Soft Shield Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium furfuratum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
